title: Tokenized securities need competition, not gatekeepers
summary: Innovation thrives when investors have choices. For tokenized securities, Washington shouldn't pick winners before the market has a chance to learn what works, argues Patrick McHenry, vice chairman at Ondo Finance and former Chairman of the House Financial Services Committee.

title: Nasdaq expands distribution of its market data into blockchain infrastructure
summary: The exchange operator will offer its TotalView data feed through Pyth's marketplace as financial firms increasingly build applications on blockchain rails.

title: Bitcoin’s quiet $59,000-$60,000 range is starting to look dangerous
summary: The token has traded in a tight band near $59,000 to $60,000 all week. The pattern echoes a calm stretch from 2024, but this one is forming below support in a falling market, and a break could open the way toward $40,000.

title: New York Life makes tokenization debut with onchain high-yield bond fund with Centrifuge
summary: The $807 billion asset manager is bringing a high-yield corporate bond strategy onto blockchain with Centrifuge as Wall Street expands beyond tokenized Treasury funds.

title: Bitcoin $4.4 billion supply overhang emerges as institutional demand wilts
